posts.author: elliothughes (Elliot)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be great to be able to add a condition after the Trigger, “Every time period” in Automations.

What are you trying to achieve

There are a number of uses for this feature. For example, for a billing department that tracks invoices from clients, it would be extremely helpful to be able to notify the individual in the “People” column every time period that a “Status” is something. But right now that is not possible. The Automation should read, “Every day at 9:00am and only if Client Status is “To Be Billed”, notify Person Assigned.” but this isn’t available without significant(ly frustrating) workaround.
